conditions.today: 6 AM—Aww yeah. The stage is set, Jackson. Sunrise is upon us, and the day is dawning in a fantastic fashion. Bluebird skies are welcoming bright solar rays to come spend the day, so grab your gear and join the dramatic alpine play. Come prepared for a springy scene because things will heat up into the mid-20s at the summit and right around 40 in the valley. West winds will cool things off a tad as they blow between 5 and 15 mph at most elevations but gust near 40 at the summit. If life is feeling a bit over the top, just call it a week and head for the Village; your one-stop shop with endless crystal treats to pillage. - Lege
conditions.yesterday: 6 AM—Up and at 'em, Jackson. The strangely engaging season of 2026 rolls on. After yesterday's warm and windy weather, we're in for a Thursday that'll feel more "cool and calm" across the land. And, with a one-inch touchup overnight, good times galore will seem to pool in the palm of your hand. Sunflakes and snowshine will reverberate off the refurbished terrain as a few passing clouds drop long shadows on the slopes. Cooler high temperatures will top out near 20 at the summit and in the mid-to upper 30s down in the village. The winds have diminished but will still be gusting out of the west between 10 and 25 mph, especially in the upper elevations. Slashing secret stashes can lead to a rapid chain reaction of euphoric synaptic flashes. Because pow blasting is a passion that nothing surpasses, a vibe more valuable than cash is. -Lege

morningBrief.headline: The Base Is Holding Up
morningBrief.body: Zero new inches, but who's complaining? 20" this week means conditions are still prime. 6 runs freshly groomed, mostly in All Terrain.
